name: Literature

options.title: A course by arrangement, in consultation with Literature Administrative Coordinator

sections.label: Foreign Language (two intermediate or advanced courses, same language)
sections.description: Two foreign language courses in the same language at the intermediate or advanced level, taken at Coe College with permission of the Literature Administrative Coordinator.

sections.label: Literature Course in a Foreign Language
sections.description: At least one literature course taught in a foreign language.

sections.label: Six Elective Courses (no more than three from English dept)
sections.description: Six courses chosen in consultation with the Literature Administrative Coordinator. No more than three from the English department may count. At least four must come from: literature in translation, English/American literature and creative writing, literature taught in a foreign language, linguistics, or Independent Study. At least one or more must be a core course: AAM/ENG-267 African American Literature, ENG-110 Ancient Mythology, or ENG-207 Gender and Literature: U.S. Pluralism.

notes: Students interested in the major should take a foreign language course and a literature course in their first year.
